sizing_rule.note: Multiply each constrained portfolio component weight by 1.9195 (geometric optimal scaling factor) to achieve unconstrained optimal allocation. Factor derived from ratio of unconstrained to constrained optimal returns per Ralph Vince optimal f methodology.

source_rule_text: Scale portfolio component weights by a geometric optimal factor (1.9195) derived from the ratio of unconstrained to constrained optimal portfolio returns to achieve geometric optimality.
